name: Shinpo Co., Ltd.
summary: Shinpo Co., Ltd. produces and distributes smokeless grills in Japan, China, South Korea, Taiwan, and internationally. The company offers radiant plates, ceramic charcoal, charcoal grills, and electric heaters. It also provides grill accessories, such as plate, crimp, and iron grills; net grill, iron grill, and pot holders; grill carriers and mobile racks; and charcoal baskets, stoves, extinguishers, carriers, tongs, and pans, as well as super nets, hot-pots, pans, hot-pot trivets, and 3D filters. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
